layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for cards and features. Asymmetrical layouts to build tension.
layout_and_spacing.section_transitions: Use diagonal geometric cuts using clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 5vw, 100% 100%, 0 calc(100% - 5vw)) to separate sections.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment, never center by default. Focus on tension and flow.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for premium momentum.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for background and foreground image parallax.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale up, gold border glow on cards. Gold text highlight on navigation.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade up with y-axis translate for lists and sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A059] text-[#0A140F] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none border border-[#C5A059] transition-all flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#C5A059] border border-[#C5A059] hover:bg-[#C5A059]/10 px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all flex items-center gap-2

cards.default: p-8 bg-[#11231A] border border-[#2A3F28] hover:border-[#C5A059]/50 transition-colors duration-300

logo.description: NATIVA gold onion emblem with transparent background

hero_background.description: Cinematic wide-angle view of a lush onion field at golden hour, deep dark green and matte gold color palette

diagonal_texture.description: Abstract elegant background with diagonal geometric cuts in deep forest green and matte gold textures

premium_onions.description: Close-up of premium red onions freshly harvested resting on rich dark soil

landscape_1.description: A bird's eye view of a farm land

landscape_2.description: Sunset over a vineyard with mountains in background

red_onion_1.description: a pile of red onions sitting on top of a wooden table

sections.hero: Parallax background using `hero_background`. Heavy overlay (bg-black/40) for text contrast. Large Cormorant Garamond heading. Subtext indicating premium seeds. Primary CTA to WhatsApp.
sections.about: Asymmetrical layout using `landscape_2` and `diagonal_texture`. Text highlighting technical authority, traceability, and tradition in agriculture.
sections.process: 8 stages of the agricultural process. Use a timeline approach or Bento grid. Use horizontal scroll with framer-motion or staggered fade-ins.
sections.differentials: Bento grid layout. Cards with glassmorphism or dark green solid fills (`bg-[#11231A]`) and gold hover borders (`hover:border-[#C5A059]`). Phosphor icons in gold.
sections.cultivars: Showcase of 3 varieties: Nativa do Vale, Nativa da Serra, Nativa Planalto. Interactive tabs or a horizontal swipe carousel. Feature `premium_onions` and `red_onion_1`.
sections.certification: A strict, authoritative block. Earthy brown/dark olive accents, formal typography.
sections.technical_notice: High-contrast block (solid matte gold background with `#0A140F` text) or very dark with gold borders. Strict, clear information.
sections.final_cta: Diagonal cut background container. Large typography. Contact ONLY via WhatsApp and Instagram buttons (no form).
sections.footer: Darkest background (`#081710`). Clean links, gold logo, elegant copyright.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts from Google Fonts in index.html: Cormorant Garamond (weights 300..700) and Outfit (weights 300..700).
Code structure, component names, and variables MUST be in English. The actual copy/text visible to users MUST be in Portuguese.
Do NOT use HTML generic input/select components; strictly use WhatsApp and Instagram action buttons for contact.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements.
Implement diagonal cuts between major sections using CSS `clip-path` or SVG overlays.
Adhere strictly to the dark green, olive, and matte gold palette. No neon or unrelated colors.
Ensure high contrast text over all images by applying gradients like `bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A140F] to-transparent`.
